privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic test student named 'Leo Vance' with student ID created dynamically during setup (date of birth 2007-04-12, grade level 10, male). The task requires entering a historical transcript record containing: Course='Biology', Grade=92 (numeric percent), School Year='2023-2024', and Credit=1.0. These values are hardcoded in the setup script, verification queries, and validator logic. The student record is created by setup_task.sh and deleted/re-created cleanly before each test run. Verification occurs by querying OpenSIS database tables (student_mp_grades or student_report_card_grades) for the specific course name and grade values.
